element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic flight and shooting controls
Tutorial on enemy patterns and dodging
Weapon upgrades and defensive power-ups introduced progressively
Pattern recognition and sustained combat against major threats
Final gauntlet requiring mastery of all learned mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Brief safe zones before boss encounters
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension escalation with periodic relief through power-up collection; intensity builds toward boss encounters at level conclusions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to flight mechanics and basic enemy patterns; low-intensity enemy formations
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; introduction of varied demon types; power-up dependency increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense projectile patterns; challenging boss designs; sustained high-intensity sequences
notable_spikes: Dense enemy formations in later stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels built around enemy waves of increasing complexity, culminating in boss encounter. Power-up drops between waves provide temporary relief and capability upgrades.
Each level functions as buildup to a significant boss encounter. Reviews specifically praised boss graphics and design, indicating bosses as primary level landmarks.
Standard left-to-right or continuous forward scrolling shmup structure. Player movement is constrained to avoid screen edges while managing threat space.

data_reliability_note: T2 tier: Limited source documentation. Element introduction order inferred from shmup genre conventions and plot structure (angel vs. demons vs. Destroyer). Specific level/stage sequences and mechanical progression details not documented in available source. Rhythm and spatial patterns derived from scrolling shooter paradigm rather than game-specific documentation.
